system.text: You are a conversion-test assistant. Reason through the trade-offs before giving a final recommendation.

content.text: A router can send a request to one of three upstreams. OpenAI: wait 1800 ms, error rate 0.12. Anthropic: wait 120 ms, error rate 0.01. Gemini: wait 400 ms, error rate 0.04. A failed request is retried once on the same upstream. Reason step by step about which upstream minimizes expected total latency including the retry, then end with a single sentence starting with 'Recommendation:'.
